testcase.name: Test Case 4
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › Chapter04\04_Parrelel_Execution_test.spec.ts:72:5 › Test Case 4 ────────────────────
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected: "https://www.youtube.com1/" Received: "https://www.youtube.com/" Timeout: 20000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 20000ms 23 × unexpected value "https://www.youtube.com/"
76 | 77 | //Validate for the URL > 78 | await expect(page).toHaveURL('https://www.youtube.com1/'); | ^ 79 | 80 | //click on search box and validate if its visible 81 | await page.getByRole('combobox', { name: 'Search' }).click(); at F:\Projects\Playwright\PlaywrightTSProject\tests\Chapter04\04_Parrelel_Execution_test.spec.ts:78:24
